hero_title: Begin your Kamakura journey with a cup of matcha.
hero_sub: Every journey begins with a cup.
concept_1: Goen Loop is an experience that begins with matcha and leads you to discover new connections with Kamakura.
concept_2: When you return your cup, you receive a ¥5 coin, a small symbol of goen.
concept_3: In Japan, ¥5 is cherished as a coin that represents meaningful connections and good fortune.
concept_4: Carry it with you, visit a shrine or temple you feel drawn to, and experience your own connection with Kamakura.
map_lead: Explore shrines and temples near MAME TO CHA.
about_hero_sub: GOEN LOOP is a small journey created by MAME TO CHA Kamakura.
about_mame_text: MAME TO CHA Kamakura serves high-quality organic Fuji matcha in the heart of Kamakura.
about_loop_text: Return your cup, receive a ¥5 coin, and begin a small journey through Kamakura’s shrines and temples.
about_question_1: Do I have to visit a shrine?
about_answer_1: No. GOEN LOOP is an invitation, not a rule. Enjoy Kamakura in your own way.
about_answer_2: Yes. Many people offer it at a shrine, but you may also keep it as a small memory of your journey.
about_question_3: How do I add this app to my home screen?
about_answer_3:
On iPhone: tap the share button in Safari, then choose “Add to Home Screen.”
On Android: open the browser menu, then choose “Add to Home Screen.
